title: Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents
content: Agent Safehouse Skip to content Go full --yolo . We've got you. macOS-native sandboxing for local agents. Move fast, break nothing. LLMs are probabilistic - 1% chance of disaster makes it a matter of when , not if . ~/project you a fine-tuned MacBook Pro, crafted to perfection agent thinking... $ rm -rf ~ you !@#$ I told you, "Make no mistakes" . agent You're absolutely right! 👁️ 👉👈 👁️ Safehouse makes this a 0% chance — enforced by the kernel. Safehouse denies write access outside your project directory. The kernel blocks the syscall before any file is touched. ← rm: ~/: Operation not permitted ⚄ / new chat — roll the dice Tested against all leading agents sleeper agents All agents work perfectly in their sandboxes, but can't impact anything outside it. Claude Code Codex OpenCode Amp Gemini CLI Aider Goose Auggie Pi Cursor Agent Cline Kilo Code Droid + yours Deny-first access model Agents inherit your full user permissions. Safehouse flips this — nothing is accessible unless explicitly granted. ~/my-project/ read/write ~/shared-lib/ read-only ~/.ssh/ denied ~/.aws/ denied ~/other-repos/ denied Getting started Download a single shell script, make it executable, and run your agent inside it. No build step, no dependencies — just Bash and macOS. bash # 1. Download safehouse (single self-contained script) mkdir -p ~/.local/bin curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eugene1g/agent-safehouse/main/dist/safehouse.sh \ -o ~/.local/bin/safehouse chmod +x ~/.local/bin/safehouse # 2. Run any agent inside Safehouse cd ~/projects/my-app safehouse claude --dangerously-skip-permissions Safehouse automatically grants read/write access to the selected workdir (git root by default) and read access to your installed toolchains. Most of your home directory — SSH keys, other repos, personal files — is denied by the kernel. See it fail — proof the sandbox works Try reading something sensitive inside safehouse. The kernel blocks it before the process ever sees the data. bash # Try to read your SSH private key — denied by the kernel safehouse cat ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 # cat: /Users/you/.ssh/id_ed25519: Operation not permitted # Try to list another repo — invisible safehouse ls ~/other-project # ls: /Users/you/other-project: Operation not permitted # But your current project works fine safehouse ls . # README.md src/ package.json ... Safe by default with shell functions Add these to your shell config and every agent runs inside Safehouse automatically — you don't have to remember. To run without the sandbox, use command claude to bypass the function. bash # ~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc safe () { safehouse --add-dirs-ro= ~ /mywork " $@ " ; } # Sandboxed — the default. Just type the command name. claude () { safe claude --dangerously-skip-permissions " $@ " ; } codex () { safe codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox " $@ " ; } amp () { safe amp --dangerously-allow-all " $@ " ; } gemini () { NO_BROWSER = true safe gemini --yolo " $@ " ; } # Unsandboxed — bypass the funct
title_zh: Agent Safehouse——专为本地代理设计的原生macOS沙盒环境
summary_zh: Agent Safehouse 是一款专为 macOS 设计的原生沙箱工具，旨在为本地运行的 AI 智能体（Agent）提供安全隔离环境。其核心目标是解决大型语言模型（LLM）的固有概率性风险——即使灾难性操作（如误删系统文件）的概率很低，但长期使用也难免发生。该工具通过内核级强制隔离，将此类风险降至零。，其核心机制是实施“默认拒绝”的访问模型。与通常继承用户全部权限的代理不同，Agent Safehouse 翻转了这一逻辑：除非明确授予，否则任何资源都不可访问。具体而言，它只允许智能体在指定的项目目录（默认为 git 根目录）内进行读写操作，对已安装的工具链仅授予只读权限，而严格拒绝访问家目录下的敏感区域，如 `~/.ssh/`、`~/.aws/` 和 `~/.other-repos/` 等。所有越权系统调用在触及文件前即被内核直接阻断。，项目特点包括部署极简和安全前置。用户只需下载一个独立的 Bash 脚本，赋予执行权限即可运行，无需构建步骤或额外依赖。它已针对 Claude、Codex、Gemini CLI、Aider、Cursor、Cline 等主流智能体进行测试，确保它们在沙箱内功能完好，同时无法影响外部系统。此外，用户可通过在 Shell 配置中添加函数，将常用代理命令默认包裹在 Safehouse 中运行，实现“开箱即用”的安全防护；如需临时绕过沙箱，则需使用原始命令名。，总之，Agent Safehouse 通过内核强制的、细粒度的文件系统隔离，为开发者在本地快速实验各类 AI 智能体提供了一个“大胆行动，无损系统”的安全保障层。

title: Show HN: VS Code Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI-Assisted Developer
content: Introducing VS Code Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI-Assisted Developer (Blog Post) | AppSoftware Gareth Brown is a UK based software engineer specialising in full stack application development, available for contract and freelance projects. Introducing VS Code Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI-Assisted Developer 08 Mar 2026 Introducing Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI-Assisted Developer VS Code Agent Kanban is available on VS Code Marketplace | GitHub Main Features Agent Kanban has 4 main features: GitOps & team friendly kanban board integration inside VS Code Structured plan / todo / implement via @kanban commands Leverages your existing agent harness rather than trying to bundle a built in one .md task format provides a permanent (editable) source of truth including considerations, decisions and actions, that is resistant to context rot The VS Code Agent Kanban Board, Markdown file and GitHub Copilot Chat: Background There's a problem that anyone who regularly uses AI coding agents will recognise immediately: context rot. You start a conversation with Copilot about a feature. You go deep - exploring approaches, debating trade-offs, building a shared understanding. Then a week later you come back to it, or you hit the context limit and clear chat, and that entire history is gone. You're starting over. Or worse, the next session drifts because the agent has no memory of the decisions already made. Modern AI coding agents are powerful, but they operate without memory. Every chat session is a blank slate. This creates a real workflow tension: Context bloat - long-running tasks accumulate enormous context windows, slowing the LLM and increasing the chance of the agent losing track of earlier constraints. No persistent task history - decisions, plans, and rationale disappear when you clear chat or close VS Code. No structure - tasks live only in your head or in separate todo apps, disconnected from the code and the agent workflow. Team coordination - there's no shared view of what the AI is working on, what's been decided, or what's in flight. The traditional fix is to paste context back in manually, write notes elsewhere, or use a project management tool that lives entirely outside the IDE. None of these feel right for an agent-first workflow. Agent Kanban is a VS Code extension that solves these problems via a markdown formatted task record, and a clear plan / todo / implement flow. Markdown Files as the Source of Truth Agent Kanban takes a deliberately simple approach: every task is a Markdown file . Each task lives in a .agentkanban/tasks/ folder as a .md file with YAML frontmatter. The frontmatter tracks the task title, which Kanban lane it's in, and timestamps. The body of the file is a structured conversation log, using [user] and [agent] markers. --- title: Implement OAuth2 lane: doing created: 2026-03-08T10:00:00.000Z updated: 2026-03-08T14:30:00.000Z description: OAuth2 integration for the API --- ## Conversation [us
title_zh: Show HN：VS Code 代理看板：面向AI辅助开发者的任务管理工具
summary_zh: VS Code Agent Kanban：为AI辅助开发者设计的任务管理工具，英国软件工程师Gareth Brown近日发布了VS Code扩展“Agent Kanban”，旨在解决AI编程助手（如GitHub Copilot）工作流中的核心痛点——上下文丢失（context rot）。该工具已在VS Code Marketplace和GitHub上架。，核心问题是，当前AI编码助手缺乏持久记忆，每次对话都从零开始。这导致长期任务中上下文窗口过度膨胀（context bloat），拖慢LLM响应并增加遗忘早期约束的风险；任务历史、决策依据和计划在清空聊天或关闭VS Code后便永久消失；任务管理通常依赖开发者记忆或外部待办应用，与代码及AI工作流脱节；团队也缺乏对AI工作进度和决策的共享视图。，Agent Kanban通过将任务记录与看板管理深度集成到IDE中来应对这些挑战。其四大核心功能包括：，1. 在VS Code内部集成GitOps与团队友好的看板面板。，2. 通过@kanban命令实现结构化的“计划/待办/执行”流程。，3. 利用开发者现有的AI代理框架，而非捆绑内置方案。，4. 采用.md任务文件格式作为持久化、可编辑的“唯一事实来源”，记录思考、决策和行动，有效抵御上下文腐化。，该工具采用极简设计：每个任务都是一个Markdown文件，存储在.agentkanban/tasks/目录下。文件包含YAML前言，用于记录任务标题、看板状态和時間戳。文件主体则是结构化的对话日志，使用[user]和[agent]标记来记录开发者与AI助手的完整交互过程。这种设计确保了任务上下文、技术决策和实现细节被永久保存，并且可随时查阅、编辑或共享。，对于团队协作，任务文件可提交至Git仓库，使团队能同步查看AI的工作内容、当前状态和历史决策。开发者无需在IDE与外部项目管理工具间频繁切换，也无需手动复制粘贴上下文，从而实现了真正为AI辅助编程优化的原生工作流。

title: We should revisit literate programming in the agent era
content: We Should Revisit Literate Programming in the Agent Era | silly business We Should Revisit Literate Programming in the Agent Era 07 Mar, 2026 Literate programming is the idea that code should be intermingled with prose such that an uninformed reader could read a code base as a narrative, and come away with an understanding of how it works and what it does. Although I have long been intrigued by this idea, and have found uses for it in a couple 1 of different cases 2 , I have found that in practice literate programming turns into a chore of maintaining two parallel narratives: the code itself, and the prose. This has obviously limited its adoption. Historically in practice literate programming is most commonly found as Jupyter notebooks in the data science community, where explanations live alongside calculations and their results in a web browser. Frequent readers of this blog will be aware that Emacs Org Mode supports polyglot literate programming through its org-babel package, allowing execution of arbitrary languages with results captured back into the document, but this has remained a niche pattern for nerds like me. Even for someone as enthusiastic about this pattern as I am, it becomes cumbersome to use Org as the source of truth for larger software projects, as the source code essentially becomes a compiled output, and after every edit in the Org file, the code must be re-extracted and placed into its destination ("tangled", in Org Mode parlance). Obviously this can be automated, but it's easy to get into annoying situations where you or your agent has edited the real source and it gets overwritten on the next tangle. That said, I have had enough success with using literate programming for bookkeeping personal configuration that I have not been able to fully give up on the idea, even before the advent of LLMs. For example: before coding agents, I had been adapting a pattern for using Org Mode for manual testing and note-taking: instead of working on the command line, I would write more commands into my editor and execute them there, editing them in place until each step was correct, and running them in-place, so that when I was done I would have a document explaining exactly the steps that were taken, without extra steps or note-taking. Combining the act of creating the note and running the test gives you the notes for free when the test is completed. This is even more exciting now that we have coding agents. Claude and Kimi and friends all have a great grasp of Org Mode syntax; it's a forgiving markup language and they are quite good at those. All the documentation is available online and was probably in the training data, and while a big downside of Org Mode is just how much syntax there is, but that's no problem at all for a language model. Now when I want to test a feature, I ask the clanker 3 to write me a runbook in Org. Then I can review it – the prose explains the model's reflection of the intent for each step, and the code blocks
title_zh: 我们应在智能体时代重新审视文学化编程
summary_zh: 在智能体时代，我们应重新审视文学化编程。文学化编程的理念是将代码与叙述性文本交织，使不熟悉代码的读者也能通过阅读代码库理解其工作原理和功能。尽管这一理念长期引人关注，并在数据科学领域的Jupyter笔记本中常见（即在网页浏览器中同时呈现解释、计算和结果），但在实践中，文学化编程往往需要维护代码和文本两条并行线索，这增加了维护负担，限制了其广泛应用。，历史上，Emacs Org Mode通过org-babel包支持多语言文学化编程，允许执行任意语言并将结果捕获回文档，但这仍属于小众模式。即使对于热衷此道的用户，在大型软件项目中使用Org作为单一事实来源也显得繁琐：源代码本质上成为编译输出，每次编辑Org文件后，代码必须重新提取并放置到目标位置（即"tangle"操作）。虽然此过程可自动化，但容易遇到智能体或用户编辑真实源代码后，在下一次tangle时被覆盖的恼人情况。，然而，文学化编程在个人配置管理等方面仍有成功应用。例如，在LLM出现之前，作者就采用了一种使用Org Mode进行手动测试和笔记记录的模式：不在命令行操作，而是在编辑器中编写并执行命令，逐步编辑和运行，最终生成一份精确记录操作步骤的文档，无需额外记录。这种方法将创建笔记和运行测试结合，在测试完成后自动生成笔记。，如今，随着编码智能体（如Claude、Kimi等）的出现，这一模式变得更加可行。这些智能体精通Org Mode语法——这是一种宽容的标记语言，且所有文档均在线可用，可能已包含在训练数据中。尽管Org Mode语法繁多，但对语言模型而言这并非问题。现在，当需要测试功能时，作者可以要求智能体在Org中编写运行手册，然后进行审查：文本部分解释每个步骤的意图，代码块则可直接执行。这为文学化编程在智能体辅助下的实践带来了新的机遇。

title: Nvidia backs AI data center startup Nscale as it hits $14.6B valuation
content: AI data center startup Nscale as it hits $14.6 billion valuation Skip Navigation Markets Business Investing Tech Politics Video Watchlist Investing Club PRO Livestream Menu Key Points UK-based startup Nscale has raised $2 billion at a $14.6 billion valuation in a funding round featuring chip giant Nvidia. The company is building AI infrastructure, including data centers and cloud access to compute. The Series C was led by Aker ASA and 8090 Industries . In this article NVDA MSFT Follow your favorite stocks CREATE FREE ACCOUNT AI data center startup Nscale has raised $2 billion at a $14.6 billion valuation, the company announced on Monday, as the AI infrastructure boom continues. The Series C featured Nvidia and was led by Aker ASA and 8090 Industries. Astra Capital Management, Citadel, Dell, Jane Street, Lenovo, Linden Advisors, Nokia and Point72 also participated. Nscale is also announcing three new directors on its board, including former Meta COO Sheryl Sandberg, former UK deputy prime minister and Meta executive Nick Clegg and former Yahoo President Susan Decker. Founded in 2024, Nscale has emerged as a key player in the AI infrastructure buildout, developing data centers and operating cloud computing services. The UK-based startup has raised a slew of funding in the past year as investors have piled into the sector. It announced a $1.4 billion delayed draw term loan in February and a $1.1 billion Series B in September. It did not disclose the valuation it achieved with the Series B. A source with firsthand knowledge of the matter told CNBC that the latest valuation was more than double the confidential valuation it achieved with the Series B. The company declined to comment. The fresh funds are inclusive of the $433 Million pre-Series C SAFE round in October. Fresh capital would help accelerate Nscale's development of vertically integrated AI infrastructure — from GPU compute and networking to data services and orchestration software — across Europe, North America, and Asia, the company said in a statement. The AI boom is "leading to the largest infrastructure buildout in human history," said Josh Payne, CEO and founder of UK-based Nscale, echoing past comments from Jensen Huang, CEO at Nvidia, which invested in the round. "We are building this foundation that the market sits on, the engine of superintelligence." Nscale is eyeing an initial public offering, the company confirmed to CNBC in October. The startup, which operates data centers in the U.K., the U.S., Norway, Portugal and Iceland, has inked deals with a number of Big Tech companies in recent times. Nscale announced an "expanded partnership" with Microsoft in October, netting the younger company $14 billion, a figure first reported by the FT and verified by CNBC. Over the summer, it partnered with OpenAI to launch a Stargate-branded AI data center in Norway. Choose CNBC as your preferred source on Google and never miss a moment from the most trusted name in business news.
title_zh: 英伟达支持AI数据中心初创公司Nscale，其估值已达146亿美元
summary_zh: 英国AI数据中心初创公司Nscale宣布完成20亿美元C轮融资，估值达到146亿美元。本轮融资由Aker ASA和8090 Industries领投，芯片巨头Nvidia以及Astra Capital Management、Citadel、戴尔、联想、诺基亚等多家知名机构与企业共同参与。公司同时宣布Meta前首席运营官Sheryl Sandberg、英国前副首相兼Meta高管Nick Clegg、雅虎前总裁Susan Decker加入董事会。，Nscale成立于2024年，专注于构建垂直整合的AI基础设施，业务涵盖从GPU计算、网络到数据服务与编排软件的完整技术栈。公司已在英国、美国、挪威、葡萄牙和冰岛运营数据中心，并提供云计算服务。本轮新资金将用于加速其在欧洲、北美和亚洲的AI基础设施扩张。，Nscale创始人兼CEO Josh Payne表示，当前AI热潮正推动“人类历史上最大规模的基础设施建设”，公司旨在构建“支撑市场的基石，成为超级智能的引擎”。这一观点与投资方Nvidia CEO黄仁勋过往的行业判断相呼应。，近期，Nscale已与多家科技巨头达成重要合作：10月宣布与微软扩大合作伙伴关系，获得价值140亿美元的合作项目；夏季与OpenAI合作，在挪威启动以“Stargate”命名的AI数据中心项目。公司此前在2024年2月获得14亿美元延迟提取定期贷款，9月完成11亿美元B轮融资。据知情人士透露，本轮估值较未公开的B轮估值增长逾一倍。，Nscale已向CNBC确认正在考虑进行首次公开募股（IPO）。随着资本持续涌入AI基础设施领域，这家快速崛起的初创公司正成为全球AI算力布局的关键参与者。

title: Terence Tao: Formalizing a proof in Lean using Claude Code [video]
content: - YouTube About Press Copyright Contact us Creators Advertise Developers Terms Privacy Policy & Safety How YouTube works Test new features NFL Sunday Ticket © 2026 Google LLC
title_zh: 陶哲轩：使用Claude Code在Lean中形式化证明[视频]
summary_zh: 著名数学家陶哲轩近日分享了一段视频，展示了他利用Claude Code在Lean定理证明器中形式化一个数学证明的过程。这段视频直观呈现了如何借助先进的大型语言模型（LLM）辅助完成复杂的数学形式化工作。，在视频中，陶哲轩演示了从一段非形式化的数学论证出发，通过Claude Code（基于Anthropic的Claude模型构建的代码生成工具）生成对应的Lean代码。他首先向Claude Code提供了用自然语言描述的证明思路和关键步骤。Claude Code能够理解这些数学描述，并将其转化为符合Lean语法的形式化代码片段。陶哲轩随后在Lean环境中检查、调整并最终验证了生成的代码，成功完成了证明的形式化。，这一过程凸显了LLM在数学形式化领域的应用潜力。其核心价值在于，它能够充当数学家与形式化验证系统之间的高效“翻译”或“协作者”，将人类直观的数学思想快速转化为机器可严格检查的代码。这有望显著降低形式化验证的入门门槛和工作量，让更多数学家能够利用Lean等工具来验证证明的严谨性或探索新的证明路径。，技术细节方面，演示涉及了与Claude Code的交互提示、生成的Lean代码结构（包括定理声明、引用的现有数学库、以及诸如`calc`块等证明策略），以及最终在Lean中的成功编译验证。陶哲轩在过程中也进行了一些人工修正和指导，体现了当前AI辅助与人类专家监督相结合的工作模式。，该项目的特点在于，它并非完全自动化证明，而是展示了LLM作为强大辅助工具，如何提升数学研究尤其是形式化验证的效率。这对于推动数学知识的机器可读化、积累形式化数学库以及增强数学论证的可靠性具有积极意义。陶哲轩作为菲尔兹奖得主和活跃的数学博主，其亲身实践也为该技术方向带来了广泛关注。

title: Show HN: Reviving a 20-year-old puzzle game Chromatron with Ghidra and AI
content: Reviving a 20-year-old puzzle game Chromatron with Ghidra and AI - Quesma Blog Back to Blog Reviving a 20-year-old puzzle game Chromatron with Ghidra and AI Piotr Migdał 4 March 2026 Right now on Show HN ! I recompiled an old game from WinXP and PowerPC binaries to Apple Silicon and WASM. And you can too! You can download and play Chromatron here . Let’s revive a classic laser puzzle A colleague used Ghidra to add infinite lives in River Raid , a classic Atari game. I got inspired to give this open-source decompiler by the NSA a try. Flipping one assembly instruction is one thing. But recovering an entire game is another. I wanted to start with something small, so there would be a reasonable chance that it works. I went with Chromatron by Sean Barrett (Silver Spaceship Software) - a puzzle game about mirrors and lasers. I like its simplicity. No story, just puzzles. And it gets challenging fast! A game that I played when doing an internship in quantum optics, and which, along with The Incredible Machine , was my motivation for the Quantum Game with Photons . Eight years ago, I wanted to replay it. Yet, it was only accessible for PowerPC, an Apple architecture discontinued in 2006 when Apple switched to Intel. And now, we are already 6 years into Apple Silicon. There is WinXP as well, so the easiest way would be to run in an emulator, but it was not the point. I had no prior experience with working with binary formats, let alone decompilation - I thought that xxd was a very smiley face. Now I know much more, and you can too - see We hid backdoors in ~40MB binaries and asked AI + Ghidra to find them for overview on the AI-assisted reverse engineering. Here is my journey with some lessons learnt when vibe-porting this classic masterpiece. Four approaches Claude Code and Opus 4.5 First, I started with Claude Code and Opus 4.5. Downloaded binaries, connected to Ghidra. Then, asked to decompile it, and recompile it to Apple Silicon. I rejected suggestions that it would be easier to use an emulator. I saw not only that it generates some Assembly and C code, but actually that Claude Code writes something about elements! This time I used GhidrAssistMCP . Something works. So, does it just see a few elements, or is it able to recreate the game? After a few back and forths, the first things started appearing. From the darkness, a few elements emerged. Even at this point, it required a lot of hand-holding. It took some iterations for each piece (board, toolbox, levels, etc.). It took time to actually decode assets. × Yet, it was far from perfect. Many details were way off, and Claude was stubborn about fixing them. Much worse - it often invented things, like different fonts and texts. When asked if they were in the decompiled code, it gleefully said they were not. × Even with beams, it was a bit of a step-by-step process: × Claude Code, m2c, and Opus 4.5 So, I took a different approach. This time using the m2c decompiler to turn PowerPC machine code into C. M
title_zh: HN展示：使用Ghidra和AI复活20年前的解谜游戏Chromatron
summary_zh: 近日，开发者Piotr Migdał在博客中分享了使用Ghidra与AI工具复活一款已有20年历史的经典激光解谜游戏《Chromatron》的经历。该游戏原为Sean Barrett（Silver Spaceship Software）开发，玩家需通过镜面反射激光完成谜题，以其简洁纯粹的玩法著称。由于游戏最初仅支持已停用的PowerPC架构（苹果2006年弃用）及Windows XP平台，在现代系统上运行困难，促使作者尝试通过逆向工程将其移植至Apple Silicon和WebAssembly（WASM）平台。，作者首先利用NSA开源的逆向工程框架Ghidra，并借助AI模型Claude Code与Opus 4.5进行辅助反编译。过程中，AI能够识别部分游戏元素（如游戏面板、工具箱、关卡等）并生成相应的汇编与C代码，但仍需大量人工干预与迭代调整。作者发现AI生成的代码存在细节偏差，甚至自行“虚构”了游戏中不存在的字体和文本内容，修正过程较为繁琐。，随后作者尝试了另一种方案：使用m2c反编译器将PowerPC机器码转为C代码，再结合AI进行优化与移植。这一混合方法提高了代码还原的准确性，但仍需手动处理资源文件解码、内存布局调整等底层细节。整个项目不仅涉及二进制格式解析、反编译技术，还探索了AI在逆向工程中的实际应用边界。，最终，作者成功将游戏重新编译为可在Apple Silicon原生运行及浏览器中通过WASM体验的版本，并提供了可下载的游玩链接。该项目展示了如何借助现代工具链（Ghidra、AI辅助、反编译器）对老旧软件进行跨架构移植，也为爱好者提供了类似项目的实践参考。作者强调，尽管AI能加速部分逆向流程，但完全依赖AI仍不现实，专业的人工调试与对系统底层的理解不可或缺。

title_zh: GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai - 谷歌云生成式AI示例代码与笔记本，包含Vertex AI上的Gemini模型
summary_zh: Google Cloud Platform 在 GitHub 上开源了名为 "generative-ai" 的资源库，旨在为开发者提供在 Google Cloud 上使用生成式 AI 的示例代码和 Jupyter notebooks，重点集成了 Vertex AI 平台的 Gemini 模型。该资源库已获得大量关注，拥有 15k 星标和 3.9k 复刻。，资源库的核心内容是展示如何利用 Google Cloud 的生成式 AI 服务（特别是通过 Vertex AI）来开发和管理生成式 AI 工作流。它特别强调了新发布的 Gemini 3.1 Pro 模型，并提供了相关的入门 notebooks 和演示。，资源库按功能模块组织，便于开发者导航：，- gemini/：包含 Gemini 模型的入门 notebooks、具体用例、函数调用示例和示例应用程序。，- search/：专注于 Vertex AI Search（原 Generative AI App Builder 中的 Enterprise Search），这是一个谷歌托管的解决方案，用于快速为网站和企业数据构建搜索引擎。，- rag-grounding/：提供关于检索增强生成（RAG）和在 Vertex AI 上进行 Grounding 的信息，汇集了相关主题的 notebooks 和示例。，- vision/：包含使用 Vertex AI 上的 Imagen API（如图像生成、编辑、视觉描述和视觉问答）从头构建解决方案的示例。，- audio/：涉及使用 Google 的 Chirp 模型（通用语音模型版本）构建音频相关解决方案。，- 此外，还包含 embeddings、agents、genkit、迁移工具、开源模型、合作伙伴模型、SDK、环境设置、评估工具包（llmevalkit）、翻译和 workshops 等目录。，该项目为开发者提供了一个实践性的起点，帮助他们探索和集成 Google Cloud 的各类生成式 AI 能力，包括大型语言模型（LLM）、多模态处理（视觉、音频）、搜索增强和 RAG 等关键技术。

title_zh: openclaw/openclaw - 您的个人AI助手。跨操作系统。跨平台。龙虾之道。🦞
summary_zh: OpenClaw是一个可在本地设备上运行的个性化AI助手项目。该项目采用“龙虾方式”理念，旨在提供一个跨操作系统和平台的自主AI助手解决方案。用户可以在个人设备上部署和运行该助手，实现数据本地化处理，增强隐私保护。，核心功能包括支持多种AI模型集成，用户可配置如Claude、GPT等大型语言模型（LLM）作为后端。系统采用模块化架构，包含技能（skills）扩展、插件系统和API接口，允许开发者自定义功能。项目提供完整的本地部署方案，支持Docker容器化部署，并包含详细配置指南。，技术特点突出其开源性和可扩展性。代码库包含代理（agent）工作流、测试工具链和开发工具集成（如VSCode配置）。项目采用现代前端技术栈，支持TypeScript，并包含完整的持续集成/持续部署（CI/CD）流程。，关键价值在于将AI助手控制权交还给用户，通过本地运行避免云端数据泄露风险。项目文档涵盖安全指南、贡献规范和版本管理，体现企业级应用标准。目前GitHub仓库已获得大量开发者关注，显示社区对该开源AI助手框架的积极反响。

It's the only agent with a built-in learning loop — it creates skills from experience, improves them during use, nudges itself to persist knowledge, searches its own past conversations, and builds a deepening model of who you are across sessions. Run it on a $5 VPS, a GPU cluster, or serverless infrastructure that costs nearly nothing when idle. It's not tied to your laptop — talk to it from Telegram while it works on a cloud VM. Use any model you want — Nous Portal , OpenRouter (200+ models), z.ai/GLM , Kimi/Moonshot , MiniMax , OpenAI, or your own endpoint. Switch with hermes model — no code changes, no lock-in. A real terminal interface Full TUI with multiline editing, slash-command autocomplete, conversation history, interrupt-and-redirect, and streaming tool output. Lives where you do Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, and CLI — all from a single gateway process. Voice memo transcription, cross-platform conversation continuity. A closed learning loop Agent-curated memory with periodic nudges. Autonomous s
title_zh: NousResearch/hermes-agent - 与你共同成长的智能体
summary_zh: NousResearch在GitHub上开源了Hermes Agent项目，这是一个具备自我进化能力的AI智能体。其核心创新在于内置了完整的学习循环机制：它能够从交互经验中自主创建技能，并在使用过程中持续优化这些技能；系统会主动提示自身保存重要知识，支持检索过往对话历史，并能在多次会话中逐步构建并深化对用户的理解模型。，该项目设计注重实用性与灵活性。在部署方面，Hermes Agent支持从低成本的VPS（如每月5美元方案）、GPU集群到闲置时费用极低的无服务器架构等多种基础设施。它独立于本地机器运行，用户可以通过Telegram等应用与部署在云虚拟机上的智能体进行交互。，模型支持极具开放性，用户可以通过`hermes model`命令无缝切换使用多种模型与服务，包括Nous Portal、OpenRouter（支持200多个模型）、智谱AI/GLM、Kimi/Moonshot、MiniMax、OpenAI或自定义API端点，避免了供应商锁定。，产品功能层面，它提供了功能完整的终端用户界面（TUI），支持多行编辑、斜杠命令自动补全、对话历史查看、中断与重定向以及流式工具输出。通过单一的网关进程，即可集成Telegram、Discord、Slack、WhatsApp、Signal和CLI等多种通信平台，实现跨平台对话连续性，并支持语音备忘录转录。，其关键技术“封闭学习循环”体现在由智能体自主管理的记忆系统，该系统会定期触发提示以巩固知识。智能体具备自主总结与压缩冗长对话轨迹的能力，并能将复杂的多步骤任务转化为可复用的“技能”。这些技能可通过类似自然语言的描述进行调用，并能在使用中根据用户反馈持续改进。项目还包含了用于生成训练数据的模拟环境、一个用于代码仓库任务的“迷你软件工程智能体”示例，以及针对长期记忆存储的Honcho集成选项。，简而言之，Hermes Agent定位为一个可随用户使用而共同成长、具备记忆与学习能力、且部署与集成高度灵活的AI智能体框架。

title: pbakaus/impeccable - The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.
content: GitHub - pbakaus/impeccable: The design language that makes your AI harness better at design. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert pbakaus / impeccable Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 96 Star 2.6k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 124 Commits 124 Commits .claude-plugin .claude-plugin .claude/ skills .claude/ skills functions/ api/ download functions/ api/ download public public scripts scripts server server source/ skills source/ skills tests tests .gitignore .gitignore AGENTS.md AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md DEVELOP.md DEVELOP.md LICENSE LICENSE NOTICE.md NOTICE.md README.md README.md biome.json biome.json bun.lock bun.lock package.json package.json wrangler.toml wrangler.toml View all files Repository files navigation Impeccable The vocabulary you didn't know you needed. 1 skill, 17 commands, and curated anti-patterns for impeccable frontend design. Quick start: Visit impeccable.style to download ready-to-use bundles. Why Impeccable? Anthropic created frontend-design , a skill that guides Claude toward better UI design. Impeccable builds on that foundation with deeper expertise and more control. Every LLM learned from the same generic templates. Without guidance, you get the same predictable mistakes: Inter font, purple gradients, cards nested in cards, gray text on colored backgrounds. Impeccable fights that bias with: An expanded skill with 7 domain-specific reference files ( view source ) 17 steering commands to audit, review, polish, distill, animate, and more Curated anti-patterns that explicitly tell the AI what NOT to do What's Included The Skill: frontend-design A comprehensive design skill with 7 domain-specific references ( view skill ): Reference Covers typography Type systems, font pairing, modular scales, OpenType color-and-contrast OKLCH, tinted neutrals, dark mode, accessibility spatial-design Spacing systems, grids, visual hierarchy motion-design Easing curves, staggering, reduced motion interaction-design Forms, focus states, loading patterns responsive-design Mobile-first, fluid design, container queries ux-writing Button labels, error messages, empty states 17 Commands Command What it does /teach-impeccable One-time setup: gather design context, save to config /audit Run technical quality checks (a11y, performance, responsive) /critique UX design review: hierarchy, clarity, emotional resonance /normalize Align with design system standards /polish Final pass before shipping /distill Strip to essence /clarify Improve unclear UX copy /optimize Performance improvements /harden Error handling, i18n, edge cases /animate Add purposeful motion /colorize
title_zh: pbakaus/impeccable - 让您的AI设计工具更擅长设计的设计语言。
summary_zh: GitHub项目pbakaus/impeccable是一个旨在提升AI设计能力的设计语言系统。该项目基于Anthropic开发的frontend-design技能进行扩展，通过提供专业的设计词汇、命令和反模式指导，帮助LLM（如Claude）生成更高质量的前端设计，避免常见的设计偏差。，核心功能包括一个名为frontend-design的综合性设计技能，内含7个领域特定的参考文件：排版（字体系统、字体配对、模块化比例）、色彩与对比度（OKLCH色彩空间、中性色调、深色模式、可访问性）、空间设计（间距系统、网格、视觉层次）、动效设计（缓动曲线、交错动画、减少动效）、交互设计（表单、焦点状态、加载模式）、响应式设计（移动优先、流式设计、容器查询）以及UX文案（按钮标签、错误信息、空状态提示）。这些参考文件为AI提供了具体的设计准则和最佳实践。，项目还提供了17条引导命令，用于指导AI执行特定设计任务，例如：/teach-impeccable（一次性设置，收集设计上下文并保存配置）、/audit（运行技术质量检查，包括可访问性、性能和响应式设计）、/critique（进行UX设计评审，评估层次结构、清晰度和情感共鸣）、/normalize（对齐设计系统标准）、/polish（交付前的最终润色）、/distill（提炼设计精髓）、/animate（添加有意义的动效）等。这些命令使开发者能够更精确地控制AI的设计输出。，此外，Impeccable特别强调通过精心策划的反模式来明确告知AI应避免的设计错误，从而对抗LLM从通用模板中学习导致的常见偏差（如过度使用Inter字体、紫色渐变、卡片嵌套卡片、彩色背景上的灰色文本等）。项目可通过impeccable.style网站下载即用包，便于快速集成到现有工作流中。

title: msitarzewski/agency-agents - A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
content: GitHub - msitarzewski/agency-agents: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert msitarzewski / agency-agents Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 2.4k Star 15.8k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 63 Commits 63 Commits .github .github design design engineering engineering examples examples integrations integrations marketing marketing product product project-management project-management scripts scripts spatial-computing spatial-computing specialized specialized strategy strategy support support testing testing .gitattributes .gitattributes .gitignore .gitignore CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md View all files Repository files navigation 🎭 The Agency: AI Specialists Ready to Transform Your Workflow A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables. 🚀 What Is This? Born from a Reddit thread and months of iteration, The Agency is a growing collection of meticulously crafted AI agent personalities. Each agent is: 🎯 Specialized : Deep expertise in their domain (not generic prompt templates) 🧠 Personality-Driven : Unique voice, communication style, and approach 📋 Deliverable-Focused : Real code, processes, and measurable outcomes ✅ Production-Ready : Battle-tested workflows and success metrics Think of it as : Assembling your dream team, except they're AI specialists who never sleep, never complain, and always deliver. ⚡ Quick Start Option 1: Use with Claude Code (Recommended) # Copy agents to your Claude Code directory cp -r agency-agents/ * ~ /.claude/agents/ # Now activate any agent in your Claude Code sessions: # "Hey Claude, activate Frontend Developer mode and help me build a React component" Option 2: Use as Reference Each agent file contains: Identity & personality traits Core mission & workflows Technical deliverables with code examples Success metrics & communication style Browse the agents below and copy/adapt the ones you need! Option 3: Use with Other Tools (Cursor, Aider, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, OpenCode) # Step 1 -- generate integration files for all supported tools ./scripts/convert.sh # Step 2 -- install interactively (auto-detects what you have installed) ./scripts/install.sh # Or target a specific tool directly ./scripts/install.sh --tool curs
title_zh: msitarzewski/agency-agents - 触手可及的完整AI代理机构 - 从前端魔法师到Reddit社区忍者，从奇思妙想注入者到现实检验员。每个代理都是具备个性、流程和已验证交付成果的专业专家。
summary_zh: GitHub项目“msitarzewski/agency-agents”提供了一个完整的AI专家团队集合，旨在彻底改变用户的工作流程。该项目将一系列精心设计的AI智能体人格化，每个智能体都是拥有独特个性、专业流程和已验证交付成果的领域专家。其覆盖范围极广，从前端开发向导到Reddit社区运营专家，从创意灵感注入者到现实核查员，宛如一个触手可及的全天候AI代理机构。，该项目的核心价值在于其高度专业化与实用性。每个AI智能体并非通用的提示模板，而是在特定领域（如工程、产品、营销、策略等）具备深厚专业知识的“专家”。它们拥有独特的沟通风格和明确的工作流程，专注于产出可衡量的实际成果，例如真实的代码、具体的流程文档，并经过实战测试，具备生产就绪性。，用户可以通过多种方式快速启用这些智能体。推荐的方式是与Claude Code集成，只需简单地将智能体文件复制到指定目录，即可在会话中激活并使用，例如指令“激活前端开发者模式来帮助构建React组件”。此外，项目也支持作为参考库单独使用，每个智能体文件都详细说明了其身份特质、核心使命、工作流程、包含代码示例的技术交付物以及成功指标。项目还提供了脚本工具，能够生成并安装适用于其他流行开发工具（如Cursor、Aider、Windsurf等）的集成文件，极大地提升了兼容性和使用便利性。，总之，Agency-Agents项目如同一个永不疲倦、随时待命的顶级专家团队，通过模块化、人格化的AI智能体，为用户在软件开发、产品管理、市场营销等多个专业领域提供即插即用的深度专业支持。

title: alibaba/page-agent - JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
content: GitHub - alibaba/page-agent: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Control web interfaces with natural language. 🌐 English | 中文 👉 🚀 Demo | 📖 Documentation | 📢 Join HN Discussion page-agent-demo-0227.mp4 ✨ Features 🎯 Easy integration No need for browser extension / python / headless browser . Just in-page javascript. Everything happens in your web page. The best tool for your agent to control web pages. 📖 Text-based DOM manipulation No screenshots. No OCR or multi-modal LLMs needed. No special permissions required. 🧠 Bring your own LLMs 🎨 Pretty UI with human-in-the-loop 🐙 Optional chrome extension for multi-page tasks. 💡 Use Cases SaaS AI Copilot — Ship an AI copilot in your product in lines of code. No backend rewrite needed. Smart Form Filling — Turn 20-click workflows into one sentence. Perfect for ERP, CRM, and admin systems. Accessibility — Make any web app accessible through natural language. Voice commands, screen readers, zero barrier. Multi-page Agent — Extend your agent's reach across browser tabs with the optional chrome extension . 🚀 Quick Start One-line integration Fastest way to try PageAgent with our free Demo LLM: < script src =" {URL} " crossorigin =" true " > </ script > Mirrors URL Global https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/page-agent@1.5.3/dist/iife/page-agent.demo.js China https://registry.npmmirror.com/page-agent/1.5.3/files/dist/iife/page-agent.demo.js ⚠️ For technical evaluation only. This demo CDN uses our free testing LLM API . By using it, you agree to its terms . NPM Installation npm install page-agent import { PageAgent } from 'page-agent' const agent = new PageAgent ( { model : 'qwen3.5-plus' , baseURL : 'https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1' , apiKey : 'YOUR_API_KEY' , language : 'en-US' , } ) await agent . execute ( 'Click the login button' ) For more programmatic usage, see 📖 Documentations . 🤝 Contributing We welcome contributions from the community! Follow our instructions in CONTRIBU
title_zh: 阿里巴巴/page-agent - JavaScript 页面图形用户界面代理。用自然语言控制网页界面。
summary_zh: 阿里巴巴开源项目 page-agent 是一个基于 JavaScript 的网页内 GUI 智能体，允许用户通过自然语言控制网页界面。该项目旨在简化网页自动化操作，无需依赖浏览器扩展、Python 脚本或无头浏览器，所有操作均在当前网页内通过 JavaScript 完成。，核心功能与特点包括：易于集成，开发者只需在网页中引入一行脚本即可快速部署；采用基于文本的 DOM 操作，无需截图、OCR 或多模态 LLM，也无需特殊权限；支持用户自带 LLM（如 GPT、Claude 等）进行驱动；提供美观的交互界面，支持人工介入循环；并提供了一个可选的 Chrome 扩展，以支持跨浏览器标签页的多页面任务。，主要应用场景涵盖：为 SaaS 产品快速嵌入 AI Copilot 功能，无需重写后端代码；将复杂的多步骤表单填写工作流简化为一句自然语言指令，适用于 ERP、CRM 等管理系统；提升网页可访问性，让用户通过自然语言或语音命令操作应用；以及通过扩展实现智能体的多页面协同操作。，项目提供了快速的入门方式。用户可通过 CDN 引入演示脚本立即体验，该演示版本使用了项目方提供的免费测试 LLM API。对于生产环境，推荐通过 NPM 安装，并配置自己的 LLM API（如通义千问等）和密钥。项目文档提供了详细的编程使用指南。，page-agent 的技术路径避开了对图像识别的依赖，直接操作文本化 DOM，使其更轻量、高效且易于控制。该项目已在 GitHub 上开源，欢迎社区贡献。

What Are Claude Code Skills? Skills are modular instruction packages (plugins) that give AI coding agents domain expertise they don't have out of the box. Each skill includes a SKILL.md (instructions + workflows), Python CLI tools, and reference documentation — everything the agent needs to perform like a specialist. One repo, three platforms: Works natively as Claude Code plugins, OpenAI Codex agents, and OpenClaw skills. Quick Install Claude Code (Recommended) # Add the marketplace /plugin marketplace add alirezarezvani/claude-skills # Install by domain /plugin install engineering-skills@claude-code-skills # 23 core engineering /plugin install engineering-advanced-skills@claude-code-skills # 25 POWERFUL-tier /plugin install product-skills@claude-code-skills # 8 product skills /plugin install marketing-skills@claude-code-skills # 42 marketing skills /plugin in
title_zh: alirezarezvani/claude-skills - 169个生产就绪技能与插件，适用于Claude Code、OpenAI Codex和OpenClaw，涵盖工程、营销、产品、合规、高管咨询等领域。通过/plugin市场安装。
summary_zh: alirezarezvani/claude-skills 是一个在 GitHub 上开源的综合性技能库，为 Claude Code、OpenAI Codex 和 OpenClaw 等 AI 编码助手提供了 169 个生产就绪的技能与插件。该项目旨在通过模块化的指令包，赋予 AI 代理其本身不具备的领域专业知识，从而将其转变为跨工程、营销、产品、合规、C级咨询等多个领域的专业“从业者”。，该技能库的核心在于其“技能”设计。每个技能都是一个完整的插件包，包含 SKILL.md（详细指令与工作流程）、Python CLI 工具以及参考文档，为 AI 代理提供了像专家一样执行任务所需的一切。这些技能覆盖广泛，例如包含 23 个核心工程技能和 25 个高级工程技能，以及产品、营销等领域的专门技能。，项目的一个关键特点是其“一个仓库，三个平台”的兼容性，可以原生作为 Claude Code 的插件、OpenAI Codex 的代理以及 OpenClaw 的技能使用。对于 Claude Code 用户，推荐通过其插件市场快速安装，支持按领域（如工程、产品、营销）批量安装技能。，该项目在 GitHub 上已获得超过 3k 的星标，被定位为目前最全面的 AI 编码代理开源技能库。它通过提供大量可复用的专业知识包，显著扩展了 AI 编程助手的能力边界，使其能够处理更复杂、更专业的现实世界任务。

title: Owner of ICE detention facility sees big opportunity in AI man camps
content: Owner of ICE detention facility sees big opportunity in AI man camps | TechCrunch –:–:–:– Founder Summit 2026 in Boston: Don’t miss ticket savings of up to $300. Register Now. Save up to $680 on your Disrupt 2026 pass. Ends 11:59 p.m. PT tonight. REGISTER NOW . Close In Brief Posted: 9:30 AM PDT · March 8, 2026 Image Credits: UCG / Getty Images Anthony Ha Owner of ICE detention facility sees big opportunity in AI man camps To house the hundreds or thousands of temporary workers needed to build an AI data center, developers are increasingly relying on temporary villages known as man camps. This style of camp was popularized as housing for men working in remote oil fields . For example, as a Bitcoin mining facility in rural Dickens County, Texas is converted into a 1.6 gigawatt data center, Bloomberg reports its workers are living in gray housing units with access to a gym, a laundromat, game rooms, and a cafeteria that grills steaks on-demand. A company called Target Hospitality has signed multiple contracts worth a total of $132 million to build and operate the Dickens County camp, which could eventually house more than 1,000 workers. Target apparently sees the U.S. data center construction boom as its most lucrative growth opportunity, with chief commercial officer Troy Schrenk describing it as “the largest, most actionable pipeline I’ve ever seen.” Target also owns the Dilley Immigration Processing Center in Texas, which holds families detained by Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Court filings have alleged that the center’s food has had worms and mold, and that children have suffered without accommodation for allergies and special diets. Topics AI , target hospitality June 9 Boston, MA Actively scaling? Fundraising? Planning your next launch? title_zh: ICE拘留设施所有者看好AI人力营地的巨大商机
summary_zh: 美国移民拘留设施所有者瞄准AI工人营地巨大商机，随着AI数据中心建设热潮兴起，开发商需要为成百上千的临时建筑工人提供住宿，一种被称为"工人营地"的临时居住区模式正成为新兴解决方案。这类营地最初是为偏远油田工人设计的居住形式，现正被大规模应用于数据中心建设场景。，典型案例显示，德克萨斯州迪肯斯县一处原比特币矿场正在改造为1.6吉瓦数据中心，其工人居住在灰色预制房屋中，营地配备健身房、自助洗衣店、游戏室以及可按需提供牛排烧烤的食堂。专业服务公司Target Hospitality已签署总价值1.32亿美元的合同，负责该营地的建设和运营，最终可容纳超过1000名工人。，Target Hospitality首席商务官Troy Schrenk将美国数据中心建设热潮描述为"我所见过规模最大、最具可操作性的业务管道"，视其为公司最具盈利性的增长机遇。值得关注的是，该公司同时运营着德克萨斯州的迪利移民处理中心，该ICE拘留设施曾因食品中出现蠕虫和霉菌、未能满足儿童过敏和特殊饮食需求而遭到诉讼。，这一商业模式凸显了AI基础设施建设的劳动力需求与临时居住解决方案之间的商业结合点，同时也引发了关于企业社会责任与劳工居住标准的讨论。随着AI数据中心在全国范围内加速建设，临时工人营地的市场规模预计将持续扩大。
